components.desc: Single index.html with layout grid (3 panels: clock, weather, todo), CSS theme (dark mode, fonts, glassmorphism cards), no build step — plain HTML/CSS/JS. Self-test: node script parses HTML, asserts 3 panel containers + linked css/js exist.

Live clock module: big HH:MM display, seconds, date line, updates via setInterval. Pure function formatTime(Date) exported for test. Self-test: node asserts formatTime output for fixed dates (midnight, noon, single-digit mins).

Weather-ish widget: fetch open-meteo API (no key) with hardcoded/configurable lat-lon, show temp + condition icon (emoji map from weathercode), graceful offline fallback text. Pure function weatherCodeToDisplay(code) exported. Self-test: node asserts emoji/label mapping for sample codes incl. unknown code fallback.

Todo scratchpad: add via input+Enter, click to toggle done (strikethrough), x to delete, persists to localStorage. Store logic (add/toggle/remove/serialize) as pure functions on plain array. Self-test: node exercises store functions with fake storage object, asserts state transitions + round-trip serialize.

Pretty pass: animated gradient background, card hover transitions, tabular-nums clock font, responsive stack under 700px, subtle fade-in on load. Self-test: node greps CSS for required rules (@media, transition, @keyframes, font-variant-numeric) and asserts all present.
